sections.paragraph:
Original: דּרמשׂק דּוּמשׂק דּמּשׂק o

Transliteration: dammeśeq dûmeśeq darmeśeq

Phonetic: dam-meh'-sek

BDB Definition:

Damascus = "silent is the sackcloth weaver"
  1. an ancient trading city, capital of Syria, located in the plain east of Hermon, 130 (205 kilometers) miles northeast of Jerusalem

Origin: of foreign origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
